zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland於大約1237年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德奧斯特賀內時，他的父親Hendrik VanVoorne33歲，母親Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing24歲。他於大約1275年與Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年12月27日在荷蘭-拉藍德盧達享年51歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德盧達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland于大约1237年出生在荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內时，他的父亲Hendrik VanVoorne33岁，母亲Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing24岁。他于大约1275年与Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1287年12月27日在荷兰-拉藍德盧達享年51岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德盧達。

nameMeanings.name: heer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Alfons, Alois, Ewald, Kurt, Monika, Otto.
German and Dutch: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name with the first element hari, heri ‘army’, as, for instance, Hermann . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.
Dutch: variant, without the definite article de ‘the’, of De Heer .

variants.name: Heerema
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Egbert.
West Frisian and Dutch (Groningen): patronymic from the personal name Heer , composed with the Frisian suffix -ma ‘(one of the) men of’.

variants.name: Heeringa
meanings: West Frisian: habitational name from any of several mansions or farms so called, for instance near Dongjum and Marssum, once inhabited by a certain Heere or Hero and his kin (see Heer 1). It is formed with the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a.

variants.name: Hehr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Elfriede, Erhart, Horst, Milbert.
German: variant of Heer 1 and 3, but in some instances a nickname either from hëher ‘jay’, or from Middle High German hēr ‘distinguished, proud’.

variants.name: Heeren
meanings: Dutch, North German, and East Frisian: patronymic from   Heer   1.

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

variants.name: De Heer
meanings: Dutch: from heer ‘(feudal) lord, master’, with the definite article de ‘the’, probably applied as a nickname to someone who behaved in a lordly manner, or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a feudal lord or the like. Compare Heer .

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright’.

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland was born about 1237, in Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Hendrik VanVoorne, was 33 and his mother, Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, was 24. He married Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy about 1275. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 27 December 1287, in Loosduinen, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 51, and was buried in Loosduinen, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland est né environ 1237, à Oostvoorne, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Hendrik VanVoorne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy environ 1275. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1287, à Loosduinen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Loosduinen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland um 1237 in Oostvoorne, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik VanVoorne 33 und seine Mutter Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing 24. Er hat um 1275 Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1287 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Loosduinen, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Loosduinen, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland è nato il circa 1237 nel Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hendrik VanVoorne, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy circa 1275. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1287, nel Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeelandが約1237年にオランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルンで生まれた時，父Hendrik VanVoorneは33歳，母Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoingは24歳であった。約1275年にCatharina van Limburg van Durbuyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年12月27日にオランダズイド-hオランドロオスドウアインで51歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドロオスドウアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland(이)가 대략 1237년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 스트보른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik VanVoorne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 12월 27일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 루즈드이넨에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 루즈드이넨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland nasceu aproximadamente 1237, em Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hendrik VanVoorne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy aproximadamente 1275. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1287, em Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland родился около 1237 г. в местности уствурн, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hendrik VanVoorne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy около 1275 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 27 декабря 1287 г. в местности лусдуаинен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности лусдуаинен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland nació aproximadamente 1237, en Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Hendrik VanVoorne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catharina van Peteghem En Cysoing, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy aproximadamente 1275. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1287, en Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Loosduinen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
